resposta:
solution:
```
class Solution:
    def removeOccurrences(self, s: str, part: str) -> str:
        while part in s:
            s = s.replace(part, '', 1)
        return s
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n*m)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution uses Python's built-in string replace method to remove the leftmost occurrence of the substring part from s in each iteration, until part is no longer found in s.
